reviews.review_description: It would be nice if you can input words or situations in the search and have it show verses pertaing to what is written. Rather than just books. Ill still give 5 stars though for the glory to God.
Add option to highlight versus with different colors, and more versions of the bible

developer_response.body: Adding colors can be worked on in the future, but regarding the Bible versions, I only include the ones that copyright law allows me to.
